category_sources: Official SourceForge homepage is for yydecode and describes release/download information for the yEnc decoder.
source_facts.description says yydecode decodes yEnc archives.
docs_sources: Official homepage from source_facts.homepage is the best available documentation surface for this small/older project.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository was found in source_facts; source archive is an official SourceForge release tarball, not a repository URL.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project homepage identifies yydecode and release/download context.
